name: aok-claude-code
description: AOK Claude Code compatibility marketplace for reusable agent workflow packs

plugins.name: engineering-guardrails
plugins.description: Hooks that enforce load-bearing engineering conventions: from __future__ import, no assert in production, alembic CONCURRENTLY discipline. Plus SessionStart reminder and pre-commit staleness nudge.

plugins.name: ship-pipeline
plugins.description: Slash commands /ship-pr and /fix-ci for the full PR ship pipeline (simplify → gates → push → PR → watch CI → squash-merge) with auto-recovery via the pr-ci-fixer agent.

plugins.name: batch-resolve-conflicts
plugins.description: Slash command /batch-resolve-conflicts that spawns parallel rebase agents for N conflicting PRs with built-in canonical-file resolution rules.

plugins.name: phased-rollout-template
plugins.description: Slash command /init-phased-project that scaffolds the standard project skeleton (CLAUDE.md, infra/ACCOUNTS+DEPLOY, docs/engineering, 9-job CI, Cloud Run deploy).
